biomarkers.MMR_MSI: mismatch-repair deficient (dMMR) -- loss of MLH1 and PMS2 by IHC; MLH1 promoter hypermethylation confirmed

imaging_summary: CT chest/abdomen/pelvis: 4.8 cm uterine mass invading >50% myometrium; two enlarged left pelvic lymph nodes (up to 1.6 cm); no para-aortic adenopathy; no distant metastatic disease. No suspicious pulmonary nodules.
pathology_summary: TAH-BSO with pelvic and para-aortic lymphadenectomy: endometrioid adenocarcinoma, FIGO grade 2, invading 70% of myometrium, positive lymphovascular space invasion. 2 of 12 left pelvic nodes positive; 0 of 8 para-aortic nodes positive. Margins negative.
prior_treatment_history: Total abdominal hysterectomy with bilateral salpingo-oophorectomy and pelvic/para-aortic lymphadenectomy (staging surgery), completed 3 weeks ago
No prior systemic therapy or radiation
proposed_plan: Adjuvant carboplatin AUC 5 plus paclitaxel 175 mg/m2 every 21 days for 6 cycles, followed by external beam pelvic radiotherapy. No immunotherapy planned.
patient_preferences: Wants the most effective treatment for cure; willing to accept added toxicity if it improves survival; prefers to avoid prolonged treatment courses if two options are otherwise equivalent.
